target: 34. Elimination Operation

(The funeral has ended,
and it's just past 6 o'clock…)

(After returning home with Mio,
I made up an excuse to go out)

(Then I rejoined Nagumo-sensei and the others,
and the three of us are now in front of Koba Mart)
(Nagumo-sensei... Will she be okay on her own?)
Let's go, Ryunosuke.
You're trusting me because of this book, right? Your novel, "Swampman," is based on a true story...!!
The "Swampman" in this story is exactly like a "Shadow," and the protagonist's name is your real name...!!
In other words, this was based on an "incident" you experienced in middle school... Isn't that right?!
You're right. I did dramatize it, and the ending is different, though...
Fourteen years ago, on this island... I encountered a Shadow, and it killed my family.
The one who saved me back then was Ginjiro Nezu over there.
And at the same time, I had a certain experience. Strictly speaking, that experience is the reason I believe you.
Wh-What do you mean...?

I can't tell you.
It's related to my true identity.
If I tell you and you get copied, the Shadows will learn my true identity. I can't take that risk.
Shadows go after the family.
If Hizuru returns to this island, she's destined to be targeted by the Shadows...
Family…?

…I see!! So that's why Ushio, Mio,
and even I are being targeted!!
Wait... Hold on. What about Alain?!
Don't worry.

I already eliminated Alain's Shadow.
I did it during the funeral.
I-I see...!!
(All this time... Nagumo-sensei has been fighting in places I didn't even know about...!!)
His shadow will no longer be able to return.
Huh!?
It's the same as measles. You get "immunity"... That's what I call it.
Even if you catch the Shadow Sickness, if you kill the Shadow that's born, you'll never get it again for the rest of your life.
I-In other words... If you defeat your own Shadow once, you'll never be copied again!?
Yeah... And I have "immunity."
That's why my Shadow doesn't exist... You can trust <color=#GF_TIPS_120>me</color>...
I see…
(People who are copied gain <color=#GF_TIPS_114>immunity</color>. This is useful information.)
But... Nagumo-sensei, you don't have immunity, right?
Then why did you come back to this dangerous island!?

"I came to help you…"
That much is certain.
Though it might be better if you don't believe me.
So, what's your plan?
The limit is in 54 hours. Everyone will disappear at the end of the summer festival...!!

That four-armed Shadow…
I felt like it was controlling all the Shadows.
If we can figure out the true identity of the "Four-Armed" Shadow and "eliminate" it by 9 a.m. on the 24th, when it appeared...
Elimination, huh... That's a good idea!
We just need to steadily take down the Shadows we find one by one... Then eventually we'll hit the "main target"!
It's simple... Pest control!!

My stepsister Mio is in danger…!!
Can you help me defeat Mio's Shadow!?
Alright. According to your notes, Mio will appear in front of Western Restaurant Kofune at 9 p.m. tonight. We'll target her there...
But there's another issue to deal with first.
The Kobayakawa family, right?
You're bound to fail if you go as you are...
What!?
I saw it... On the 24th. Shiori... was on the shrine grounds!!
So I will fail to eliminate Shiori today... Is that it?

Yes…!!
So let me come with you too!
Shiori is the one who killed Ushio!! There's no mistaking it... She's also my enemy!!!!
(Besides, even if the worst happens and we fail again...)
(Why did we fail? I want to know the reason!!)
…Alright.
Hizuru Minakata
But I'm the only one who needs to go inside...
Shinpei Ajiro

Nagumo-sensei, what's wrong?
You seem to be listening to something on your phone…
Ah... He doesn't have memories from when he's Hizuru.
Huh!? What does that mean...?

(Is it something about Nagumo-sensei's true identity?
Then I can't ask…)
(For now, I'll just trust her. I'm counting on you, Nagumo-sensei...!!)
Hizuru Minakata
Understood, Sis.

Ah!
Hizuru!!
Sorry to intrude during dinner—. No, my apologies.
I had some gifts from Tokyo to give you.
Eeeeeh! You didn't have to do that~!!
…Please come in.
Excuse me, then.

Sorry, Asako…
Can I open this here?
Yeah!
Hey, Hizuru... If you'd like, do you want to stay for dinner?
I have so much I want to talk about— I want to introduce my husband, too.
No, thank you. I won't be staying long.
(Alright, I crushed its head...! But the Shadow's true body is 2D!!)
(Attacking its 3D form doesn't deal damage... but it's using the eyes on its face to see me!!)
(Even if it's only temporary, crushing them has meaning!!)

(There are two more Shadows in this house…
Asako's husband Tatsuo and daughter Shiori!)
(If they find out I know how to kill Shadows, they'll be on guard and won't come near me.)
(If I'm going to kill them, it's best to do it at the same time...!!)
Shinpei Ajiro
I was wondering...
What?
Nagumo-sensei... Do you have a split personality?
A split personality!!? ...Why would you think that?
It's what Nagumo-sensei muttered at the cannon ruins!!

"Did you meet your brother?"…
That means…
Hmph... It's not entirely wrong...
I-Is Nagumo-sensei really going to be okay alone!?

We'll wait here!
Until we get the signal…
If you've seen it, then you know, right? "Ryunosuke" has the strength to fight Shadows...
…Ryunosuke!?
Yeah...
He's strong…!!
I'll be blunt... I don't trust you like she does... And I don't understand what this loop nonsense is...
Hizuru told you, didn't she?
"In this future you saw, you weren't at the Kobayakawa house."
"If you go inside, the reason Shiori Kobayakawa's Shadow escapes might change..."
"And if that happens, we won't be able to form the right countermeasures next time..."

She's trying to figure out the cause of the failure.
All we can do is wait…!!
…Yes.
Listen up. She believed in you.
She isn't going to die today... If that turns out to be a lie, I won't forgive you...
…Yes…
(It's true, Nagumo-sensei was strong...)
(When she defeated Mio at the shrine, she moved faster than that agile shadow... That was "Ryunosuke"!!)
Nezu-san... About this "Ryunosuke"... Could you tell me about him...!?
Tch... Well, you'd find out soon enough if you looked into it...

Hizuru had a twin brother…
That was Ryunosuke.

Fourteen years ago…
His body was found on Mt. Takanosu.

When I heard Hizuru's scream…
I rushed over since I was working nearby.

Ryunosuke was…
In a terrible state.
...Meaning?
He was eaten.
All over his body... there were bite marks where flesh was torn off. Everyone made a huge fuss, saying it was the work of wild dogs...
A mountain hunt was organized immediately under police direction... But Hizuru said...
This was a "murder"...!!
Wh-What was her proof?
Mixed in with the bite marks... right here on his neck... There were marks from being strangled...!!
<color=#GF_TIPS_035>Ryunosuke</color> wasn't eaten to death. He was killed first, and then eaten...
That was Hizuru's claim.
But the autopsy results were "death by hemorrhagic shock"... No one believed what Hizuru said.
Even if we wanted to investigate, the body was cremated that same day.
Nezu-san... That sounds exactly like Ushio...
Yeah, ain't it similar?
Everything might be connected.
The monsters that have been nesting on this island since fourteen years ago—no, even longer...
The Shadows took our families from us...
Hizuru Minakata

Dad?
…Mom?
No way... Wh-Why?
Why did you kill me?
(I missed!?)
(No, I felt resistance!! I definitely smashed the Shadow with my hammer...!)
…Tch!
(It ran away... Was it too shallow...!? I guess hitting the edge doesn't do much damage...)
(No!! But it's strange... Normally, that should have been a guaranteed fatal blow.)
(Something's wrong... That Shadow... "Shiori"!!)
(But it really did run to the third floor... Just like Sis said...)
Shinpei Ajiro
I intend to "eliminate" every last Shadow from this island... even if it costs me my life.
Do you have that kind of resolve? Shinpei...!!
Yes...!! I want to protect my family, too... Even if it costs me my life!!
I have the resolve!!
Hmph! I don't trust words... We've talked too much.
Just stay quiet now...
Th-That's a message from Nagumo-sensei, right!? Let me see it, too!
"Asako and Tatsuo are eliminated. Failed to kill Shiori. Escaped to the third floor"...
"I will pursue, but it might turn out just as Shinpei-san said," huh...
Tch!
Change to Plan B...! It's our turn.
Plan B...!!

Here!
Your nail gun!
Let's see it, then... This resolve of yours...
